name: webfetch
description: Self-hosted web search for LLM agents - same accuracy as hosted web_search at a third of the cost

plugins.name: webfetch
plugins.description: web_search, fetch_url, save_finding, status, and savings_report tools backed by a local search -> fetch -> rank pipeline with semantic caching. Up to 8x fewer input tokens and 3x lower cost than hosted web search. Needs uv; API keys optional (DDG works with none).
